name: Cromwell Property Group
analysis: CMW's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 8% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.4420, stop A$0.4059, target A$0.5503 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
